basics.name: Ismail Kattakath
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer | Cross-Platform AI Solutions
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with deep expertise in building cross-platform AI applications using Node.js, React, Electron, and React Native. Proven track record of shipping production-grade applications with on-device AI capabilities. Strong foundation in systems engineering, CI/CD pipelines, and modern developer tooling.

work.name: Silver Creek Insights Inc.
work.summary: Building AI-as-a-Service platform with focus on on-device inference and cross-platform deployment.
highlights: Architected scalable GenAI infrastructure supporting multiple diffusion models and LLMs with on-device optimization
Implemented distributed inference techniques reducing latency by 40% using Kubernetes and vLLM
Designed GPU cluster management playbooks including model versioning, rollback strategies and load balancing
Built enterprise-grade secured API architecture using centralized gateway/aggregator pattern

work.name: Homewood Health Inc.
work.summary: Led development of cross-platform digital mental health solutions serving 15+ federated vendors.
highlights: Led complete frontend migration from AngularJS to modern React/Next.js architecture
Established comprehensive CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time from 4 hours to 20 minutes
Rebuilt authentication system implementing OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow for SSO integration
Collaborated with multiple vendors to configure and troubleshoot SAML 2.0 authentication
Inherited and revitalized abandoned MEAN stack application into production-ready platform

work.name: Etuper Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
work.summary: Led development of hospitality software suite with cross-platform mobile and desktop components.
highlights: Designed scalable microservices architecture with containerized, discoverable APIs
Introduced development standards reducing production incidents by 65%
Built multiple client applications including AngularJS web platforms and React Native mobile solutions
Managed sprint planning, daily standups, backlog prioritization and blocker resolution
